Video.summary: Jack Weston and Michele Lee join for a sketch juxtaposing couples. Also: a doctor's visit is an emotional.
Video.title: Jack Weston, Michele Lee

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Maggie Smith and Tim Conway!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Ross Martin & Martha Raye guest! Martha & Carol play mismatched jurors, and Ross is in "Storefront Hospital."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Ross Martin

Video.summary: Andy Griffith & Barbara McNair star. Featuring a coach who brings work home, & a number about Smokey The Bear.
Video.title: Andy Griffith, Barbara Mcnair

Video.summary: Guest star Lucille Ball joins Carol for a glittering showbiz sketch, "The Rock Sisters!"
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Guest stars Bing Crosby and Paul Lynde take a trip to Canoga Falls in tonight's "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway breaks up Harvey in "The Dentist." Also: Carol looks to steal the show from a Broadway star.
Video.title: Ethel Merman, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars. Includes a take-off of film noir "Laura." Also: Stella Toddler meets The Oldest Man.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Premiere guest stars Jim Nabors! Includes Tim Conway as a soldier, and Jim dropping in on "The Family."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin dazzles with his famous impressions, then joins up with Lana Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Who loves ya, Carol? Guest star Telly Savalas, that's who!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Telly Savalas, Smothers Brothers

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features "Carol & Sis", where hypochondriac Harvey must avoid an ailing Carol.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Joel Grey & Cass Elliot guests! Features a salute to Foreign Language films, and a sketch with puppies.
Video.title: Joel Grey, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Charo guest! Tim plays a man at a unisex salon, a guy trying to stay awake, and a journalist.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Charo

Video.summary: Maggie Smith returns to guest star as the erudite teacher of Eunice and Ed's son Bubba in "The Family."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Vincent Price and Eydie Gorme star. Features an encounter on an elevator & the movie spoof "House Of Terror."
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Kaye Stevens and Audrey Meadows guest star, featuring "As The Stomach Turns" and the "10th Avenue Family."
Video.title: Kaye Stevens, Audrey Meadows

Video.summary: William Conrad & Isabel Sanford star! Short spoofs highlight this episode, which also features "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: William Conrad, Isabel Sanford

Video.summary: You get two Carols for the price of one when Carol Channing guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carol Channing

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Steve Lawrence guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays an airport guard. Carol & Harvey play actors suffering Carol's lack of contact lenses.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Spoofs of classic movies abound, including "Ninotchka", "Blackboard Jungle", "Gone With The Wind", and more.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters and Cass Elliot guest star in the latest "As The Stomach Turns".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Donald O'Connor star. Featuring a housewife plagued by ads and a spoof of "College Musical."
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Donald O'Connor

Video.summary: Debbie Reynolds and John Davidson guest star, highlighted by the stirring saga So Proudly We Heal.
Video.title: Debbie Reynolds, John Davidson

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence is your MC for a roast of Nora Desmond. In "Carol & Sis", Vicki helps sober up a tipsy Carol.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters guests and is interviewed by Harvey. In "Carol & Sis", Carol and Harvey struggle with names.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Tim Conway & The Pointer Sisters star! Sketches include "Up Your Income", and Tim as Nora Desmond's butler.
Video.title: Tim Conway, The Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Lily Tomlin & Steve Lawrence star! Lily plays a prison matron while Steve plays a crime boss on his honeymoon.
Video.title: Lily Tomlin, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guest Robert Goulet joins Q&A. Sketches include the aftermath of a party, and a maid entranced by a star.
Video.title: Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Guests Ronnie Schell and Vicki Carr take to the stage with stand-up and song (respectively)!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ronnie Schell, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Bob Newhart appears in "Carol & Sis" as Roger's accountant. Also: a hungover Harvey gets a bigger headache.
Video.title: Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Jack Klugman plays a skeptical man annoyed by his sister-in-law's visiting date--a clairvoyant.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jack Klugman

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests! Jim plays a chaperone. Carol and Harvey are majestic in a King Henry VIII sketch.
Video.title: Jim Nabors
